text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, Flash, isn't today... your birthday?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's correct... Was there something you
wanted to talk to me about?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... I was just wondering if you had anyone
to celebrate it with.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, you must've seen me staring at my planner
and gotten worried about me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, you've no need to worry. I was actually
in the middle of making some last-minute
adjustments to my birthday party plans.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You see, Falcon decorated our room, so I want to
make sure we have time to take down those
decorations afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So that's what it was. I'm sorry, you're just always
so serious that I—ah, sorry, I didn't mean that in a
bad way...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...If you'd like, would you care to come eat some
of the cake with us? Think of it as a token of
appreciation for kindly reaching out to me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...!
Of course, if you'll have me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Splendid. Let me write your name down in my
planner. Scarlet... and done.
